title: Glu Pack 2024
description: Glu Pack 2024! Updated and now uploaded to Modrinth!
body:
## Minecraft, but steam age (and cottagecore?!)

Enjoy a diverse collection of mods based around the Steam age & farming based gameplay, from Create & its expansions & addons to a simple farming playthrough with Farmer's Delight or Lets Do!.

The pack also includes tools to improve gameplay mechanics and allow for smoother gameplay.

Mods include:

- Create (inc. Deco, Jetpacks, Crafts & Additions, Enchantment Industry and more!)
- Farmer's Delight (inc. Chef's Delight, End's Delight)
- Aquaculture
- Comforts
- Handcrafted
- Various Macaw's Mods
